title: Set Up Inngest Background Jobs with Next.js
summary: Full Inngest integration — event-driven functions, cron schedules, step functions with retries, and local dev server for testing.
declaration: I will integrate Inngest into this Next.js project for background job processing. This includes installing the SDK, creating the Inngest client, setting up the serve API route, and writing event-driven and scheduled functions. I will NOT use raw setTimeout/setInterval or manual queue implementations. If you need a different job processing approach (BullMQ, pg-boss, etc.), say so before I begin.
